scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/bin/mcp.ts src/bin/cli.ts --target=node --format=esm --outdir=dist && chmod +x dist/mcp.js dist/cli.js
scripts.prepack: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.install:local: bun pm pack && npm i -g "./log-works-$npm_package_version.tgz" && rm -f "./log-works-$npm_package_version.tgz"
